outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Net negative GEX (-4.6B) with monthly -6.43B indicates dealers short gamma, amplifying price swings. 0DTE gamma flip coincides with spot.
outlook.summary: Market at critical inflection with spot (670.51) testing 0DTE gamma flip (669.98). Extremely bearish positioning (Monthly PCR 2.30, skew 1.91), but massive put walls at 660/650/645 create structural support. Max pain zone 667-680 acts as magnet. Break below 660 triggers volatility explosion; clearance above 675 targets 680-700.
